    Description

    DistillationColumn.applyEconomicRatioOverrides(DistillationColumn.ColumnOptimizationState state, double condenserRefluxRatio, double reboilerRatio)

    Apply selected annualized-cost result to the live column and return final diagnostics.

    DistillationColumn.applyOptimizationTemperatureProfile(DistillationColumn.ColumnOptimizationState state)
    Apply a linear endpoint temperature profile when both endpoint temperatures are specified.

    DistillationColumn.applyShortcutEndpointDuties(DistillationColumn.ColumnOptimizationState state, ShortcutDistillationColumn shortcut)
    Apply shortcut endpoint duties and reflux to a rebuild state.
    private DistillationColumn.TrayOptimizationResult
    DistillationColumn.applyTrayOptimizationResult(DistillationColumn.TrayOptimizationResult selectedResult, List<StreamInterface> optimizationFeeds, DistillationColumn.ColumnOptimizationState state, double productSpec, String componentName, boolean isTopProduct, int evaluatedCases, int convergedCases, String message)
    Apply the selected candidate to the live column and return final diagnostics.

    Evaluate one annualized-cost optimization candidate.

    Evaluate one tray-count/feed-tray candidate.

    DistillationColumn.getSelectedCondenserRatio(DistillationColumn.ColumnOptimizationState state)
    Get the reflux ratio recorded as selected by an economic candidate.
